reference: In the presence of right side pain, a shrunken gallbladder means chronic cholecystitis. It is also imperative that you undergo laparoscopic gallbladder removal surgery as early as possible.
text: In the presence of right-sided pain, a shrunken gallbladder means chronic cholecystitis. It is also imperative that you undergo laparoscopic gallbladder removal surgery as early as possible.
